cafe24Link.label: Notice
cafe24Link.title: Link your existing Almondyoung (Cafe24) account
cafe24Link.p1: Following the website renewal, you need to link your existing Cafe24 Almondyoung account.
cafe24Link.p2: Linking your Cafe24 account lets you carry over your existing membership benefits to your new account.
cafe24Link.p3: Please tap the button below to link your existing Almondyoung account.

signupRenewal.label: Notice
signupRenewal.title: [Notice] Please sign up again following the website renewal
signupRenewal.p1: As the website has been newly renewed, your previous membership information was not migrated, so you need to sign up again.
signupRenewal.p2: We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience.
signupRenewal.p3: After signing up again, you can use the service exactly as before.
signupRenewal.p4: After signing up, link your existing Cafe24 account on the My Page, and your existing membership (remaining period and benefits) will be transferred automatically.
signupRenewal.p5: However, your accumulated points are not transferred automatically. Please send us your new ID along with your existing Cafe24 ID via KakaoTalk inquiry, and we will move your points over.
